queryExpr:
SELECT served_msisdn,
         count(1) call_count
FROM fct_huw_med_msc
WHERE xdr_date
    BETWEEN '$P{start_date}'
        AND '$P{end_date}'
        AND other_party_nw_ind_key = '3'
        AND call_type = 'MOC'
        AND served_msisdn IN ('966579185152')
GROUP BY  served_msisdn
HAVING count(1) > $T{call_count}

datasetColumns:

FROM fct_huw_med_msc
WHERE xdr_date

        AND '$P{end_date}'
        AND other_party_nw_ind_key = '3'
        AND call_type = 'MOC'
	and served_msisdn in (966579185152)
